mano_cua.result_summary: .datepicker__input外观符合预期：background transparent, border 0, border-radius 0px, box-shadow none, -webkit-appearance none。无浏览器默认按钮样式。实际为div元素非input元素。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: All computed styles confirm flat, transparent input appearance with no browser default button styling.

deploy_notes.workaround: Created dev-main.js entry, fixed vue.config.js devtool/entry, node-sass replaced with dart-sass
